name: Cannoli
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oil in the deep fryer.
2. Sift together 4 cups all-purpose flour and 1 cup Sauterne.
3. Add the egg yolks, olive oil, lemon rind, cinnamon, instant coffee, and first measure of sugar to the flour mixture. Mix with your hands, adding just enough liquid to form a dough.
4. Turn out onto a floured surface and knead until smooth and elastic.
5. Chill for several hours.
6. Cut dough into walnut-sized pieces.
7. Roll each piece very thin on a well-floured board.
8. Cut rounds using a 5-inch cutter or saucer.
9. Wrap each round around a cannoli mold (or a piece of wood the thickness of a broom handle and about 5 inches long).
10. Secure the overlapping part with an egg yolk.
11. Carefully lower the filled cannolis into the hot oil and fry until golden brown.
12. Remove from the oil and drain on absorbent paper.
13. Allow to cool slightly, then gently press the molds out one end.
14. Cool completely before filling.
15. Combine the ricotta with the remaining filling ingredients (vanilla, lemon rind, citron, chocolate, cinnamon, coffee, sugar).
16. Fill each cooled cannoli shell with the mixture and serve.
